creator: bsdx@looksharp.net
text:
Upgrade to port is available
"Renaming of files/dirs. Shows verbose info about CDs.
-data option and CDplus options added for multisession.
Added a busy pointer. Bugfixes."
This version requires the latest mkisofs which is already in ports.

Fix: 

change version to 0.1.34 in makefile
make makesum
commit
(no PLIST changes necessary)
